problem id: 4d20d5c5
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) AND NOT SHL(2)

examples:
  10101100 -> 01001001
  11010110 -> 10100101
  00110111 -> 00100010
  11011010 -> 10010101
  11011000 -> 10010001
  10110110 -> 00100101
  00100011 -> 01000010
  01111110 -> 00000100
  10001111 -> 00000011

query: 11110100
predicted answer: 00101001
